name: Customer Persona Builder
description: Customer Persona Builder - Marketing template for brand professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Start With What You Know Go to the Persona Builder tab. Start filling in the fields you already know — demographics, job title, industry. Do not overthink it. First drafts are meant to be rough. Step 2: Add Psychographics This is where personas come alive. Fill in goals, frustrations, values, and fears. What does this person actually care about? What keeps them up at night? This section separates useful personas from useless ones.
